title: Central Master ToDo XHTML Consolidation
description: Iteration history: (1) Session 3 created todo/ directory with JSON structure. (2) Session 4 added ToDos tab to FeatureRequests XHTML. (3) Session 6 created XHTML-MasterToDo.xhtml as single source of truth. New categories added: regression, smoke-test, review, iteration. Invoke-TodoManager.ps1 provides automated index refresh.
notes: Evolution tracking: ToDo system matured from flat JSON to full XHTML hub with category-based filtering and systematic management routines.
